notes: SHIP v1.14.329 - Clean the white halo under the .326 HANDOFF feature-art panel (owner-approved after I flagged it verifying .326). DIAGNOSIS: the handoff art (icons/phantom-feat-handoff-720.webp) carried a baked drop-shadow that came through its base64->alpha conversion as a NEAR-WHITE translucent band at the bottom (measured in-canvas: bottom-band 3.3% translucent pixels at avg luma 235, ~2x the coverage and much brighter than the .325 PLATFORMS panel the owner already accepted at 1.5%/luma176). On the dark Work->Handoff screen that reads as a dirty light halo = the 'no white halo' item on the verify checklist. The .pfeat__art CSS drop-shadow is BLACK (rgba(0,0,0,.55)) so invisible on black - NOT the cause; the halo was baked into the asset. FIX: alpha-flood-fill from all borders removing connected pixels that are translucent (alpha<252) AND achromatic (max-min channel <55) -> the near-white shadow band goes to alpha 0 while the opaque machine (incl. its colored LED glows and enclosed bright highlights) is preserved; re-encoded canvas.toDataURL('image/webp',.92) = transparent VP8X phantom-feat-handoff-v2.webp (alpha set, 720x720 preserved, 133848b). VERIFIED in a clean black side-by-side render: the light band under the panel is gone in v2 (bottom-band translucent-light 2.32%->0%); the residual bottom brightness is the machine's own opaque metallic base (design, not a halo). Shipped under a NEW FILENAME (raster-by-filename convention) so the cached opaque-shadow .326 art can't be served stale; repointed 2 refs (dct-ios.html .pfeat__art src + sw.js precache), removed the old icons/phantom-feat-handoff-720.webp. NO CSS/JS change; the baked decorative status text (SOURCE_SYNC 88% / STEP 4 OF 9) remains the DECLARED owner honesty-lock exception - untouched. Gates: inline-JS vm.Script compile x3, sw.js ok, version.json valid (Write not prefix-Edit), CSS brace net-0, three-stamp .328->.329 lockstep. DEVICE-VERIFY (installed PWA, hard-refresh / clear SW cache first): Build -> SHIFT HANDOFF panel; the machine floats with NO light smudge/halo under its bottom edge on the dark screen; art crisp, eyes/arrow/text intact. ROLLBACK: repoint src+precache back to phantom-feat-handoff-720.webp and restore it, revert the 3 stamps.
